response.justification: Bogdan Szabo’s resume shows extensive experience in software development, web technologies, and cloud infrastructure, but lacks any direct experience with hardware optimization, AI accelerators, SoC/IP modeling, or GPU architecture—core requirements for this role. His background in web/mobile development and general software engineering does not align closely enough with the specialized hardware and AI workload expertise needed for this Principal Performance Architect position.
strengths: Strong software development and architectural experience across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded systems)
Proven ability to optimize performance in high-throughput systems (e.g., micro-services handling millions of requests)
Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, indicating adaptability to emerging tech
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC/IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, or AI accelerator architectures
Lacks educational or professional background in hardware optimization, deep-learning workload analysis, or GPU architecture
Resumé shows no work related to AI accelerators, SIMD/MIMD architecture, or performance bottlenecks in hardware systems
